name: Online Shopping Place Order
use_case:
Use Case ID: UC003
Use Case Name: Place Order
Actor: Registered Customer
Pre-Condition: Customer is logged in and has items in shopping cart
Post-Condition: Order is placed and confirmation is sent

Main Flow:
1. Customer clicks "Checkout" button from shopping cart
2. System displays order summary with item list and total price
3. Customer reviews order and clicks "Proceed to Payment" [A1]
4. System displays available shipping addresses
5. Customer selects a shipping address [A2]
6. System displays available shipping methods with costs
7. Customer selects a shipping method
8. System displays payment methods
9. Customer selects payment method [A3] [E1]
10. System processes payment [E2] [E3]
11. System creates order with unique order number
12. System sends order confirmation email to customer
13. System displays order confirmation page with order details

Alternative Flows:
[A1] Customer clicks "Edit Cart": Return to shopping cart page
[A2] Customer clicks "Add New Address": System shows address form, customer fills and saves, return to step 4
[A3] Customer selects "Cash on Delivery": Skip step 10, proceed to step 11

Exception Flows:
[E1] Customer's payment method is expired: System shows error and prompts to select another method
[E2] Payment processing fails: System displays error message, return to step 8
[E3] Payment timeout (no response in 5 minutes): Transaction is cancelled, customer notified
